mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, parent_comment_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, content, is_visible, is_deleted, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM site_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_comment_id IS NULL AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, post_id, parent_comment_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, content, is_visible, is_deleted, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM site_comment WHERE parent_comment_id = #{parentCommentId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, post_id, parent_comment_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, content, is_visible, is_deleted, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM site_comment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_comment ( post_id, parent_comment_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, content, is_visible, is_deleted, like_count, dislike_count, report_count ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{userRoleType}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{content}, #{isVisible}, #{isDeleted}, #{likeCount}, #{dislikeCount}, #{reportCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_comment SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_comment SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_comment SET dislike_count = dislike_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_comment SET dislike_count = GREATEST(dislike_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_comment SET is_deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
